zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Cressy於1313年9月28日出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍德索可時，他的父親William de Cressy III21歲，母親Mrs. Joanna Cressy23歲。他於大約1334年與Matilda de Paunton在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年2月7日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾林肯享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Cressy于1313年9月28日出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾霍德索可时，他的父亲William de Cressy III21岁，母亲Mrs. Joanna Cressy23岁。他于大约1334年与Matilda de Paunton在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1346年2月7日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾林肯享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cressy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Creasey  , a cognate of 2 below.

French: habitational name from any of several places in northern France, in Saône-et-Loire, Seine-Maritime, and Somme, all named with the Gallic personal name Crixsos (from Latin Crixsus) ‘curly-haired man’ + the Latin locative suffix -acum. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Creasey
meanings: English (Lincolnshire, or Norman origin): habitational name from Cressy in Seine-Maritime, France (see   Cressy  ).
Possibly an Americanized form of any of the German names mentioned at   Creasy  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Cressy was born on 28 September 1313, in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Cressy III, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. Joanna Cressy, was 23. He married Matilda de Paunton about 1334, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 7 February 1346, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Cressy est né le 28 septembre 1313, à Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Cressy III, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Joanna Cressy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Paunton environ 1334, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 7 février 1346, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Cressy am 28. September 1313 in Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Cressy III 21 und seine Mutter Mrs. Joanna Cressy 23. Er hat um 1334 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda de Paunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Februar 1346 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Cressy è nato il il 28 settembre 1313 nel Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Cressy III, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Joanna Cressy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Paunton circa 1334, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 7 febbraio 1346, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Cressyが1313年9月28日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホードソックで生まれた時，父William de Cressy IIIは21歳，母Mrs. Joanna Cressyは23歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMatilda de Pauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年2月7日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Cressy(이)가 1313년 9월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 호드속에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Cressy III(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Joanna Cressy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Matilda de Paunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 2월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 링코컨에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.28 September 1313–7 February 1346: 28 de setembro de 1313–7 de fevereiro de 1346
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Cressy nasceu em 28 de setembro de 1313, em Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Cressy III, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Joanna Cressy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Paunton aproximadamente 1334, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1346, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Cressy родился 28 сентября 1313 г. в местности ходсокк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Cressy III было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Joanna Cressy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Paunton около 1334 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 7 февраля 1346 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.

es.28 September 1313–7 February 1346: 28 de septiembre de 1313–7 de febrero de 1346
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Cressy nació el 28 de septiembre de 1313, en Hodsock, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Cressy III, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. Joanna Cressy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Matilda de Paunton aproximadamente 1334, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1346, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años.
